theme_and_brand.vibe: Warm, human, trustworthy, welcoming, and distinct from corporate-cold platforms.
theme_and_brand.concept: A 'home-first' approach. Instead of treating real estate like purely clinical data, the UI treats it like inviting physical spaces. Uses soft shapes, warm typography, and organic colors.

rules: Never use pure black or grey. All text must be tinted with the Forest Green hue (#22332A or #4A4F4A).
Terracotta (#C15C3D) is the ONLY color used for Primary CTAs and high-intent actions.
Background is a warm cream (#FDFBF7), never pure white (#FFFFFF), except for elevated cards.
Headings use Fraunces to project warmth, trust, and a 'home' feeling.
Body text uses Manrope for extreme clarity in data-dense areas (filters, stats).
Never center-align large blocks of text. Stick to optical left alignment.

bento_grid.span_logic: Families (col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2), Students (col-span-4 row-span-1), Professionals (col-span-4 row-span-1)

rules: Use 2-3x more padding than standard designs. Cards should use p-8 or p-10.
Do not use generic Bootstrap columns. Use asymmetrical Bento grids for featured sections.
Images should never exceed 80vh on mobile.

components.search_bar: Massive floating glassmorphic container overlapping the hero image. Use 'Crystal Glass' style: bg-white/80, backdrop-blur-xl, border-white/40 inner stroke, soft shadow.

cards.style: Solid background (#FFFFFF), 1px solid border (#EAE5DC), rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl.
cards.hover: Subtle lift (-translate-y-1), drop shadow increases slightly, image slightly scales up.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), bg-[#C15C3D], text-white, px-8 py-4, transition-transform active:scale-95.

components.tags: Small rounded badges for 'PG', 'Rent', 'Sale'. Background: #E8DCC4 (Sand) or #DCE2DA (Sage), text: #22332A.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Minimal glassmorphism. Prefer 'Tactile Neumorphism' (crisp 1px borders + soft shadow).
visual_enhancers.overlays: Hero images must use a warm gradient overlay (e.g., from-black/60 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast, never flat black.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with 'duotone' or 'regular' weight for an approachable feel.

hero_bangalore.description: Bangalore city skyline for the main hero background.

category_family.description: Happy family in a cozy living room. Use for the 'Families' persona card.

category_students.description: Students hanging out in an apartment. Use for the 'Students / PG' persona card.

category_professionals.description: Modern aesthetic living space. Use for 'Working Professionals' persona card.

listing_independent_house.description: Modern house exterior for property listing placeholder.

listing_apartment.description: Cozy apartment interior for property listing placeholder.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Google Fonts: 'Fraunces' and 'Manrope'. Add them to your HTML/CSS.
Implement a massive, clear Search Hero. Include inputs for City (Bangalore), Property Type, Budget, and Purpose (Rent/Buy/PG).
Use Shadcn UI for forms, selects, and dialogs, but customize them heavily to remove the 'Vercel look' and match the warm Terracotta/Green theme.
Ensure the layout feels 'roomy' with generous padding (p-8, p-12).
Create a 'Curated For You' section using a Bento grid layout (asymmetrical tiles).
Include an 'Explore Localities' quick-link section for Bangalore (Koramangala, Indiranagar, Whitefield, HSR).
Use `data-testid` on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, filters).
Never use `transparent` backgrounds over images if content sits inside; always use a blur/scrim.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
